16.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
16.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

16.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
16.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
16.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

16.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
16.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

16.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
16.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

16.gl: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
16.kj: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).
16.dv: from an unused root meaning to sever;

17.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
17.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

17.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
17.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

17.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
17.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

17.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
